reasoning: The CCCS CM-6 control focuses on ensuring secure configuration settings, which can be mapped to several Kubernetes security domains. Secure API server configuration is crucial for protecting the cluster's control plane. Etcd encryption ensures that sensitive data stored in etcd is protected. Audit logging is essential for tracking configuration changes and access, while enforcing least privilege through RBAC ensures that users have only the permissions they need.
title: CCCS CM-6: Configuration Settings
